description: Alice asks to move 'my 2 PM today' to 4 PM, then clarifies it is the performance review. Tests time-reference-based event identification.

events.title: Performance Review
events.reasoning: Alice moves the performance review from 2 PM to 4 PM today. The 2 PM slot corresponds to the Performance Review in calendar context. Location and duration unchanged. Matches calendar event [2].
events.assumptions: Duration preserved as 1 hour. Location unchanged per Alice's confirmation.

mock_llm_response.summary: Moved performance review from 2 PM to 4 PM today.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday). Alice initially references '2 PM' then clarifies it is the Performance Review. Performance Review is calendar_context[1] so existing_event_id=2. Budget Call at 11 AM is not touched.
